attempts.strategy: Build F_{(f)} as the iterated Mathlib restriction: restrict F along open immersion D(f) ↪ Spec R, then along inverse of affine iso basicOpenIsoSpecAway f : D(f) ≅ Spec R_f
attempts.code_tried: noncomputable def modulesRestrictBasicOpen (F : (Spec R).Modules) : (Spec (CommRingCat.of (Localization.Away f))).Modules := (F.restrict (specBasicOpen f).ι).restrict (basicOpenIsoSpecAway f).inv
attempts.insight: Iso is an open immersion (instance auto-synthesized); double-restrict is the clean transport.

next_steps: Wire root import so sync_leanok recognizes it; feeds presentation_restrict_basicOpen once L2 lands.

attempts.strategy: Comparison iso F|_{D(f)} ≅ (pullback specAwayToSpec).obj F: merge the two restrictions via restrictFunctorComp.symm then identify with pullback via restrictFunctorIsoPullback
attempts.insight: Direct composition of two Mathlib natural isos .app F; axiom-clean.

attempts.strategy: Identify the geometric localisation map specAwayToSpec f with Spec.map (algebraMap R R_f); exploit that basicOpenIsoSpecAway is defeq IsOpenImmersion.isoOfRangeEq
attempts.insight: L2 feeder: reduces tilde_restrict_basicOpen to a single tilde base-change compatibility gap.

findings.blocker: Mathlib has no pullback/base-change compatibility for tilde: pullback (Spec.map φ) ∘ tilde ≅ tilde ∘ baseChange φ. This IS Stacks 01I8 lemma-widetilde-pullback, unformalized. Confirmed via loogle + leansearch returning nothing.

attempts.code_tried: lean_loogle "AlgebraicGeometry.tilde, Scheme.Modules.pullback"; lean_leansearch for pullback of tilde = tilde of base change
attempts.insight: No base-change/pullback compatibility of tilde exists in Mathlib.
Section fact exists but lifting to a full sheaf-of-modules iso over Spec R_f needs stalkwise comparison or per-D(g) gluing — multi-hundred-LOC, same order as the qcoh_iso_tilde_sections crux.

next_steps: Build standalone Mathlib supplement: pullback (Spec.map φ) ∘ tilde ≅ tilde ∘ baseChange φ for ring hom φ; specialise to algebraMap R (Away f). Do NOT re-dispatch without this infra first.

findings.blocker: Transitively blocked on tilde_restrict_basicOpen (L2): the free-module-restricts-to-free clause needs L2 to identify O_{D(g)}^{(I)} with tilde(R_g)^{(I)}.

attempts.strategy: Re-derive the unexported StructureSheaf.germₗ.map_smul recipe from public lemmas
attempts.insight: Must use erw (not rw): structure-sheaf ring section appears in ≥3 defeq-but-not-syntactic forms; stating germ on (tilde M).presheaf.germ (not moduleStructurePresheaf) lets the caller's rw match.

attempts.strategy: Package the public Ab-stalk map as an R-linear map; prove map_smul' inside the LinearMap structure via germ_exist + germ-linearity chain
attempts.code_tried: map_smul' r ζ := by dsimp only [RingHom.id_apply]; obtain ⟨U, hxU, s, rfl⟩ := germ_exist ...; rw [← tilde_germ_algebraMap_smul ...]; erw [stalkFunctor_map_germ_apply ×2]; rw [toPresheaf_map, mapPresheaf_app]; simp only [Opposite.unop_op]; erw [Hom.app_smul, tilde_germ_algebraMap_smul ...]; rfl
attempts.lean_error: (intermediate) failed to synthesize HSMul on standalone r • σ ζ; rewrite pattern Hom.app_smul not found before mapPresheaf_app/unop_op normalization
attempts.insight: map_smul' must be proved INSIDE the LinearMap structure (standalone r•σζ fails HSMul synth — codomain only DEFEQ to (tilde N).stalk). Hom.app lands in Ab not ModuleCat; O_X(U)-linearity is Scheme.Modules.Hom.app_smul (found via exact?), not map_smul. Insert simp [Opposite.unop_op] before Hom.app_smul; trailing rfl bridges germ vs toPresheaf.germ.

attempts.strategy: Identify stalkMapₗ with IsLocalizedModule.map by IsLocalizedModule.ext (agree on image of toStalk M x), close via iter-034 germ-naturality helper
attempts.code_tried: apply IsLocalizedModule.ext _ (toStalk M x).hom (fun s => map_units (toStalk N x).hom s); ext m; change stalkMapₗ f x ((toStalk M x).hom m) = _; rw [LinearMap.comp_apply, IsLocalizedModule.map_apply]; exact tilde_stalkFunctor_map_toStalk f x m
attempts.lean_error: (intermediate) rw IsLocalizedModule.map_apply pattern not found until LinearMap.comp_apply inserted first; show→change to dodge linter
attempts.insight: Genuine identification of two differently-constructed stalk maps, not a tautology; needs LinearMap.comp_apply before map_apply.

attempts.insight: Short but non-trivial: depends on two non-trivially-proved lemmas.

findings.blocker: Not a single hard step but a multi-decl categorical build: (1) natural iso packaging M↦stalk_x(~M) ≅ LocalizedModule functor; (2) PreservesFiniteLimits of localization (flat); (3) jointly-reflecting stalk family. Infra blocker: Scheme.Modules.toSheaf does NOT exist, so toPresheaf lands in presheaves where stalks do not jointly reflect isos — preservesLimitsOfShape_of_evaluation reduces to sections over each U (sheaf-condition equalizer of products of localisations), not a single localisation.

attempts.strategy: Reduce to jointly-reflecting stalk family via toSheaf
attempts.insight: No toSheaf into TopCat.Sheaf Ab X; jointly-reflecting-on-sheaves route needs that functor built first OR the section-equalizer route.

next_steps: Build natural iso tilde.functor R ⋙ toPresheaf ⋙ stalkFunctor x ≅ LocalizedModule functor ⋙ forget₂ _ Ab using stalkMapₗ/stalkMapₗ_eq; then PreservesFiniteLimits = localization-is-flat; final lift via jointly-reflecting stalk family once toSheaf (or section-equalizer route) available.
